description_long: This street light features a tall, cylindrical metal pole with a robust, dark-colored base and a pointed finial at the top. Two horizontal crossbars are attached to the pole, likely for mounting signage or additional fixtures. The main lamp head is mounted on a single, gracefully curved arm extending from the upper section of the pole, with a modern, streamlined design and a flat, elongated lamp cover. A small utility box and a secondary fixture are attached to the lower section of the pole, possibly for sensors or communication equipment. The pole itself is mostly smooth with subtle banding and a reinforced base, suggesting durability for urban environments. The overall appearance is functional yet slightly decorative, suitable for city streets or public spaces.
description: A tall, metal street light with a curved arm supporting a modern lamp head, two crossbars, and a sturdy, banded base. Additional fixtures and a utility box are attached to the pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved lamp arm and head extending to the left, two crossbars, and the utility box on the lower left side.
description_view_1: Side view with the pole and base visible, lamp arm and head not visible, showing the pole's slim profile and finial.
description_view_2: Rear view with the curved lamp arm and head extending to the right, two crossbars, and the utility box on the lower right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the pole and base visible, lamp arm and head not visible, showing the pole's slim profile and finial.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, elongated lamp head with a flat cover and no visible decorative elements; likely features an integrated diffuser.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Subtle banding at the base and top, otherwise plain with no elaborate ornamentation.
